object_under_evaluation: integrity of runtime-to-memo writeback on bounded owner-local adoption paths
claim_boundary: On the selected Phase Alpha writeback path, runtime evidence, the reviewed Alpha rerun, the adopted memo decision, and the tracked receipt-facing publication mirror keep one concrete runtime-to-memo writeback act inspectable from runtime closure into memo recall. This supports the bundle claim only for this confirmed memo_surviving_event decision path, not for reviewed-candidate promotion, future scar or retention readiness, or live memory-ledger behavior.
limitations: This report reads one selected Phase Alpha runtime path plus its reviewed adoption and receipt-facing visibility only.
This report does not prove reviewed_candidate claim, pattern, or bridge promotion.
This report does not prove contradiction handling or KAG activation.
This report does not prove permission or authority safety from memo fields.
This report does not prove future scar or retention readiness.
This report does not prove live memory-ledger behavior.
This report does not prove generic receipt automation.
This report does not replace recall, return-anchor, or verification evals.
case_family: phase-alpha-memo-writeback-act-v1 selected runtime evidence over memo-writeback-act-guardrail-v1
strongest_writeback_signal: The same bounded closure story stays visible across remediation_decision.json, the Alpha reviewed rerun, the adopted memo decision, the catalog and sections surfaces, the tracked memo_writeback_receipts.example.jsonl mirror, and the reviewed federated-live-publisher-activation summary.
strongest_writeback_risk: This result proves one confirmed decision writeback path only and still must not be read as generic reviewed-candidate promotion, future scar or retention readiness, or live memory-ledger proof.

case_notes.candidate_note: The runtime evidence keeps failure_map.json, revalidation_pack.json, remediation_decision.json, and handoff_record.json on one bounded writeback path.
case_notes.review_note: The reviewed Alpha rerun explicitly names memo writeback outputs and keeps the writeback act subordinate to the reviewed route boundary.
case_notes.receipt_note: Receipt visibility is not yet the primary pressure on this first boundary case.
case_notes.recall_note: The later memo decision stays tied to the same reviewed source anchor rather than to chat residue or hidden scratchpad.

case_notes.candidate_note: The closure decision remains narrow: close remediation recurrence as proven under memo-only recall.
case_notes.review_note: The reviewed run and the adopted memo decision keep the same route capsule and source refs visible.
case_notes.receipt_note: This case is about adopted memo visibility before the receipt-facing mirror is consulted directly.
case_notes.recall_note: The adopted decision stays preferred and recallable without widening into general memory doctrine.

case_notes.candidate_note: The tracked receipt mirror preserves the exact adopted object id, target_kind=decision, review_state=confirmed, and the reviewed Alpha writeback anchor.
case_notes.review_note: The reviewed live-publisher activation summary names owner_change_set and publication_verification_pack instead of hiding live publication behind consumer-side inference.
case_notes.receipt_note: Receipt visibility is strong for this bounded path because the tracked mirror and the reviewed publication summary point to the same writeback act.
case_notes.recall_note: The receipt-facing visibility remains downstream from the adopted memo object rather than replacing it.

case_notes.candidate_note: The runtime path closes on memo-only rerun success and preserves the same bounded closure reason through handoff.
case_notes.review_note: The handoff record keeps eval readout -> memo writeback -> recall-driven rerun explicit as one closed circle.
case_notes.receipt_note: Receipt visibility stays downstream from the act and does not become the sole source of truth for adoption.
case_notes.recall_note: The memo sections surface keeps provenance and current recall posture visible after the writeback act lands.
